posts.text: The biggest mistake small podcast teams make? Treating raw transcripts as publish-ready truth. Clean transcripts before asking tools or teammates to build on them—otherwise you get awkward summaries and misleading quote cards that erode listener trust.

Where does automation help your podcast workflow—and where does it create more cleanup than it saves? The line sits between repetitive transforms (transcription, formatting) and editorial judgment (titles, edge cases, what actually goes live).
